body:
## What this does

Installs a governed **Company OS control layer** so Claude Code sessions operate like a launch team (brand, website, growth, delivery, governance, verification) instead of a one-off file editor. Built to fit the **real repo** — `frontend/` Next.js build, the existing `Makefile` gates, the existing `docs/00_constitution/` doctrine, and the 5 already-registered subagents — **not** a greenfield rewrite.

## Changes (52 files)

**Control layer (`.claude/`, force-added — `.claude/` is gitignored, matching the existing tracked agents)**
- `CLAUDE.md` — session constitution; links the canonical doctrine rather than forking it
- 8 launch **agents**: `brand-director`, `website-architect`, `visual-identity-designer`, `growth-strategist`, `seo-geo-agent`, `conversion-specialist`, `proof-governance-reviewer`, `qa-verifier`
- 6 **skills**: brand · website · growth · governance · delivery · verification
- 5 **commands**: `/dealix-audit` · `/dealix-brand` · `/dealix-build-website` · `/dealix-growth-os` · `/dealix-verify`

**Truth & strategy docs**
- `docs/00_platform_truth/` — brand identity, visual identity (grounded in the real navy `#001F3F` + gold `#D4AF37` tokens), messaging house, product family, **module status map** (mapped to `dealix/registers/no_overclaim.yaml` so nothing is over-claimed as LIVE)
- `docs/01_go_to_market/COMMERCIAL_LADDER.md`
- `docs/03_governance/` — Claims Register + Approval / No-Spam / Data-Retention / Proof-Pack policies
- `docs/04_delivery/` — Command Sprint delivery + customer folder
- `docs/05_founder/LAUNCH_NEXT_ACTIONS.md`
- `docs/06_growth/` — 11-doc Self-Growth OS (loops, free tools, funnel, SEO/GEO, content, nurture, partner, referral, experiments, metrics, conversion)

**Gates**
- `scripts/verify_website_positioning.py` — deterministic positioning/claims guard. Scans customer-facing surfaces; **skips doctrine/negation text** and excludes the `docs/` doctrine tree by design (it exists to *enumerate* prohibitions). Both `default` and `--all` modes are **green**.
- `.github/workflows/dealix-launch-gates.yml` — least-privilege (`contents: read`), path-filtered; complements `ci.yml` (does not duplicate the frontend build).

**Copy fix (governance)**
- `landing/case-study-pilot-example.html` and `landing/architecture.html`: two **pre-existing** "auto-send" claims rewritten to approval-first wording (per founder decision), matching the site's own `NO_LIVE_SEND` differentiator.

## Verification
- `python scripts/verify_website_positioning.py` → **PASS** (default + `--all`)
- `make env-check` / `scripts/check_env_contract.py` → **PASS**
- Workflow YAML validated

## Honest flags
- ⚠️ `make security-smoke` is **red on `main`** (pre-existing — test fixtures using `sk_live_` patterns), so it is intentionally **not** wired as a hard gate here.
- The growth funnel map assumes `frontend/[locale]` route names from the brief; confirm against actual Next.js routes before treating the funnel map as live.
- Seeded Claims Register rows are stamped "Founder" as examples — founder should sign off / correct (see `docs/05_founder/LAUNCH_NEXT_ACTIONS.md` action #3).

## Doctrine respected
No guaranteed revenue · no fake proof/testimonials/scarcity · no auto-send · no cold automation · no scraping · one primary CTA per page · Arabic-first · module status labels · evidence-or-hypothesis claims only.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01UfSTrCq7yzVFh4cevkgQGB

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01UfSTrCq7yzVFh4cevkgQGB)_

commits.messageBody:
Install a governed Company OS control layer for Claude Code sessions,
aligned to the real repo (frontend/ build, existing Make gates, existing
constitution) rather than a greenfield rewrite.

- CLAUDE.md: session constitution linking docs/00_constitution canonical doctrine
- .claude/agents: 8 launch agents (brand-director, website-architect,
  visual-identity-designer, growth-strategist, seo-geo-agent,
  conversion-specialist, proof-governance-reviewer, qa-verifier)
- .claude/skills: 6 skills (brand, website, growth, governance, delivery, verification)
- .claude/commands: 5 commands (audit, brand, build-website, growth-os, verify)
- docs/00_platform_truth: brand, visual, messaging, product-family, module-status
  (module status mapped to dealix/registers/no_overclaim.yaml — no overclaiming)
- docs/01_go_to_market/COMMERCIAL_LADDER.md
- docs/03_governance: claims register + approval/no-spam/retention/proof-pack policies
- docs/04_delivery: command sprint delivery + customer folder
- docs/05_founder/LAUNCH_NEXT_ACTIONS.md; docs/06_growth: 11-doc Self-Growth OS
- scripts/verify_website_positioning.py: deterministic positioning/claims gate
  (skips doctrine/negation text; both scan modes green)
- .github/workflows/dealix-launch-gates.yml: least-privilege gate, complements ci.yml
- landing/: fix 2 pre-existing auto-send claims to approval-first wording

https://claude.ai/code/session_01UfSTrCq7yzVFh4cevkgQGB
commits.messageHeadline: Add Dealix Claude Company OS launch layer

title: Add Dealix Claude Company OS launch layer
